name: Pengana Global Private Credit Trust
analysis: PCX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$1.9758. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.9714 where 7 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.9758, stop A$1.9376, target A$1.9870. Risk/reward is 0.29:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
